channel.title: Tech on iLostMyAim
channel.description: Recent content in Tech on iLostMyAim

item.title: Steam Controller 2026 Review vs Xbox, PS5 & 8BitDo
item.description: Hands-on review of Valve's 2026 Steam Controller. We compare it against Xbox, PS5 DualSense, and 8BitDo controllers — plus 5 games it shines in.

item.title: Self-Hosted Software Stack: Immich, LM Studio & Opencode
item.description: Discover my self-hosted software stack: Immich for photo management, LM Studio for local AI, and Opencode for AI agents. All running on my own hardware.

item.title: Building a Desktop PC from Spare Parts: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Learn how to build a desktop PC from spare parts with this step-by-step guide. Covers parts selection, assembly, and troubleshooting for budget builds.
